form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.25 lengths fifth (23.11) over 400m at Warragul. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 400m at Geelong beaten 5 lengths (23.24) behind That's My Cousin in a Grade 5 on March 27. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.00) at Warragul in a Special conditions Veteran race, finishing seventh and beaten 7 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting seven victories and 10 places from 23 starts. Suited here and expected to run well.
